name: Nina Maehara
description: __Birth Place:__ Kanagawa, Japan __Height:__ 170 cm (Self-described) Nina is a member of Rat Production's idol group, Fruit Tart, and is in charge of costumes. Ever since she was a little girl, she had been a fashion model for western-style clothes. But now at age sixteen, Nina's height increased - and continues to increase - rapidly. This resulted in difficulty finding work as a model in Japan since such in-demand fashion clothes could barely fit her. She is sometimes the biggest draw of Fruit

name: Oto Adashino
description: [Ren's](https://anilist.co/character/309910/Ren-Adashino) younger sister who attends an all girls' school. She is initially distrustful of [Sumireko](https://anilist.co/character/296535/Sumireko-Ogawa) and is weak to sweets.

name: Palmon
description: Tanemon first digivolved to Palmon to protect Mimi from Kuwagamon. She later digivolved to Togemon when the Black-Gear-infected Monzaemon attacked them in Toy Town. Since then, she and Mimi have been good friends, but Palmon often tries to make Mimi appreciate what she has. When the DigiDestined returned to the Real World to halt the plans of Myotismon, she digivolved to Lillymon when Mimi shed sincere tears for the well-being of her father when he tried to trip DarkTyrannomon in vain. name: Payne
description: Payne is the top player in NewWorld Online and considered to be the strongest. He is the guild master of the Congregation of the Holy Swords alongside Frederica, Dread, and Drag. Although polite, he sees Maple as a rival he aims to defeat in the future.

name: Pesci
description: Pesci is a member of La Squadra di Esecuzione. He operates together with Prosciutto, who he refers to as his "big brother" (most likely in the yakuza sense). Although he appears timid, he is actually even more dangerous than Prosciutto, which the heroes eventually find out the hard way. His Stand is named Beach Boy (ビーチ・ボーイ Bīchi Bōi). This Stand takes the form of a fishing rod with a skull-shaped reel. The line can phase through any non-living thing, and sense living things in the immediate vic
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind

name: Quele Sellier
description: Lisara's distant cousin and another Grim Reaper. She calls Lisara "Onee-sama" despite not being her sister. She made a contract with Mina as her energy source to both Ryosuke's and Lisara's dismay. Wields a gladius called "Carnun Solace". (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Ragou
description: The Black Sun, a legendary mononoke that has lived for over a millennia, renowned for raw power beyond any other: Ragou. Taking the form of an adorable pure black cat, Ragou may seem to not be much, though he very much is. Contained within that ball of fluff is power that exceeds any other mononoke could ever dream of having. Mononoke chase after Ragou to have his power or to join forces with him, though he wants no part of it. After being randomly set free from a sealing stone, Ragou ran away a

name: Rayburn Espelindo
description: A falsely accused prince with a tarnished image. Rumor has it that he loves bloodshed and is always craving for action. In reality, he's a calm person who was roped into royal family politics.

name: Rena Minami
description: A Magical Girl who has trouble opening up to others. Rena acts cocky to make up for her lack of self-confidence, which leads people who don't know her well to misunderstanding her. She's a picky eater and loves sweets. She is also a big fan of idols.

name: Rin Kagawa
description: Rin Kagawa is a junior (kouhai) of Tanaka Ayumu, Kakuryuu Takeru and Mikage Sakurako. She attends the same middle school as all of her seniors, and also in high school. She was in the former Kendo Club in middle school and joins the Shogi club due to following Ayumu's steps. She loves to compete in any competition especially Shogi and Kendo with her senpais, especially Ayumu and Takeru. ~!She is in love with [Ayumu](https://anilist.co/character/127464/Ayumu-Tanaka) but she will only confess to h
mediaTitles: When Will Ayumu Make His Move?
When Will Ayumu Make His Move?

name: Rina Shioi
description: She is a very intelligent girl, analyst, strategist and somewhat clumsy, but when discovering the truth about the Tempest her way of acting changed radically to a more sinister, aggressive, psychopathic attitude and with murderous instincts to obtain all the possible magical objects. She is also quite sarcastic and sometimes does not take the situations seriously. She also has a warmer personality that is not usually shown when she wanted to shake hands with Tsuyuno.

name: Sakura Fujima
description: **Hometown:** USA **Motto:** Con pan y vino se anda el camino (With bread and wine, you can walk your road). A girl who grew up in Los Angeles. Good with English, but terrible with Japanese kanji. Since she was raised by her grandmother in place of her parents who were busy with work, she is very close to her grandmother. Her favorite food is smashed cucumbers with plum dressing. (Source: Official Website)

name: Sandalphon
description: Having arisen from a deep, long slumber, this archangel has inherited the will of the supreme primarch, Lucifer. Though Sandalphon previously had no role to play, he now bears the burden of carrying out vengeance in hopes of fulfilling a promise.

name: Secco
description: Very little is known about Secco, as not even the boss was able to find concrete information regarding his past. Apparently he was once a patient of Cioccolata, but sharing Cioccolata's warped mind and thoughts of spreading suffering, they formed a partnership. (Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia)
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind

name: Seiri Fukiyose
description: Touma's classmate, Aisa's best friend, often takes up roles of the class representative even though it's Aogami who is the class representative. She dislikes people (namely Touma) who give up on their life and blame it on bad luck like Touma, yet she secretly has a crush on him. It's debatable if she is tsundere towards Touma or only dislikes him because of his attitude towards life and school in general but for sure she does have a sort of friendly relationship with him, even sometimes playing
mediaTitles: A Certain Magical Index: The Miracle of Endymion
searchTerms: A Certain Magical Index: The Miracle of Endymion

name: Shinji Matou
description: Sakura Matou's older brother, and a long-time friend of Shirou. Shinji is very popular as vice-captain of the archery dojo despite being chauvinistic and a narcissist. Like Rin Tohsaka, he is of a distinguished lineage of sorcerers, though the Matou blood has thinned and no longer produces heirs naturally capable of sorcery. Shinji feels uncomfortable with his sister's daily visits to Shirou's home. He has an open crush on Rin, but she does not return his favors.
mediaTitles: Fate/stay night: Unlimited Blade Works 2nd Season
searchTerms: Fate/stay night: Unlimited Blade Works 2nd Season

name: Shinya Kiritani
description: A veteran player who has top class combat ability. He defeats the last boss in the online game "The New Gate" and releases tens of thousands of players that had been trapped inside. After defeating the last boss, he gets swallowed up by a strange light and he finds himself inside the game, 500 years into the future.
